reviews.comment:
Para ser el "ACA" me esperaba los baños más limpios, paramos porque justamente decíamos "como es el ACA deben estar bien limpios" pero no fue así.

(Translated by Google)
For being the "ACA" I expected the bathrooms to be cleaner, we stopped because we said "since it's the ACA they must be very clean" but it wasn't like that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWemJQWlVnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service, a great place to take a break before continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:
Desastre!!! No hay nada ...queres comprar un cafe todo CERRADO!!! HORRIBLE LUGAR! ESPERO QUE NADIE DEBA PARAR AHI POR ALGUNA CIRCUNSTANCIA ..ES EL DESIERTO MISMO

(Translated by Google)
Disaster!!! There's nothing... you want to buy a coffee and everything is CLOSED!!! HORRIBLE PLACE! I HOPE NO ONE HAS TO STOP THERE FOR ANY REASON... IT'S THE DESERT ITSELF
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWckkyeTlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
como siempre, el Automovil Club.brinda un muy buen parador, si le hacen falta mas surtidores lo demas, es decir ACA lo mejor....

(Translated by Google)
As always, the Automobile Club provides a very good rest stop; if it needs more gas pumps, the rest is fine. In other words, ACA is the best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobTZ2em1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
cuidado venden nafta con agua.nunca mas vuelvo a ese lugar.mal trato de empleados.
una verguenza.

(Translated by Google)
Beware, they sell gasoline mixed with water. I'm never going back to that place. The employees treat you badly.
It's a disgrace.
